description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 16.

Incapacitations

Certain spells and abilities provide players with the ability to “stunlock” the bad guy. Famously, a high-level Monk can dish out enough stunning strikes to dazzle any monster foolish enough not to have immunity to the stunned condition. Casters can sling ten or so lowerlevel spells that are highly incapacitating, and will destroy your action economy if they get through. Something as simple as Sleep, Hideous Laughter, or Slow can arrest the battle’s momentum for the price of a low-level spell slot.

A single Legendary Foe can never be completely neutralized, come their turn to play. Our solution is to add fixes to both Characters and Foes that allow for a certain bypass of condition immunities. Second, an ability in every legendary foe’s toolkit to end stun-locks and similar effects. Third, a way to reward Legendary Characters for getting incapacitating effects through the foe’s high saving throws without the save-or-suck dynamics of D&D.

HERE BE LEGENDS

Limited

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
